proposal.working_title: AI Implementation Blueprint Explained: The 90-Day Operator Roadmap That Replaces Scattered AI Pilots
proposal.one_line_angle: Most operator teams burn 18 months on disconnected AI experiments before shipping a working system; the Blueprint approach explained here is the 90-day, payback-ranked roadmap that sequences workstreams so revenue starts moving in week 4 instead of quarter 4.
outline_bullets: What an AI implementation blueprint actually contains, explained without the consulting jargon
How to pressure-test any blueprint before kickoff, using a 5-question operator gate
Sequencing blueprint workstreams so payback hits in 30 days instead of waiting for the rollout finish line
